summary: On April 19, 2026, Ukrainian suicide drones attacked the port area in Feodosia, Crimea. The 66th Separate Mechanized Brigade used the TerMIT ground unmanned system to evacuate a severely wounded soldier from the "Fireflies" battalion. The 2nd Battalion of the 35th Marine Brigade reported successful operations against Russian drones, maintaining control of the Ukrainian sky. Russian forces destroyed a Ukrainian TOS-1A MLRS using a Bulava loitering munition followed by FPV drones. The "Rubicon" Center recorded over 24,000 enemy target destructions, with unmanned systems comprising 36.7% of hits. On April 18, 2026, Rubicon operators destroyed 129 targets across multiple directions, and on April 20, they destroyed 112 targets, including Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs.
